description: Quaid DAB §8 Conversation Memory baseline — extraction pipeline (LoCoMo + LongMemEval)
notes: §8 drives the full extraction pipeline: memory_add_turn → session close → extraction worker → fact pages → query fact pages.
The pre-existing locomo_eval.py and longmemeval_adapter.py ingest raw conversation pages via `quaid import`.
Those adapters measure pre-extraction retrieval quality and are listed as Advisory Benchmarks in benchmarks/README.md.
A §8-compliant harness must ingest via memory_add_turn, close sessions, wait for the extraction worker, then query the produced fact pages.
CI gate requires Phi-3.5 Mini (~2 GB). Follow the BEIR #[ignore] pattern: run manually on release branches, not per-PR.
Regression threshold is 3 absolute F1 percentage points — NOT a relative delta vs FTS5 and NOT matching §4's 2% nDCG@10 tolerance.
Both baselines are null/pending until a §8-compliant harness is implemented and measured after the extraction pipeline lands.

locomo_f1_absolute.note: Absolute F1 >= 40% against LoCoMo QA pairs on extraction-produced fact pages. Baseline must be measured after a §8-compliant harness (not locomo_eval.py) is run with the extraction pipeline active. Pre-extraction advisory value via locomo_eval.py is informational only.

longmemeval_r5.note: R@5 >= 40% against LongMemEval QA pairs on extraction-produced fact pages. Same harness requirement as locomo_f1_absolute. longmemeval_adapter.py (raw-page import) does not satisfy §8.
